title: CI: build/test/lint + determinism test + verification-gate test + dependency-license + no-secrets audit
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. CI is where the determinism contract and verification gate become enforced rather than aspirational, and where the no-secrets guardrail is mechanically checked. It depends on core-002.
objective: Add CI that runs build/test/lint plus a determinism test, a verification-gate test, a dependency-license check, and a no-secrets audit.
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs build, typecheck, lint, and unit tests and fails on any error.
CI includes a determinism test (same input -> same hash across two backends) and fails on mismatch.
CI includes a verification-gate test and fails if the HARD RULE gate does not hold.
CI fails on a license-incompatible dependency and on any secret detected in code, artifacts, or ledger fixtures.
output: A PR adding CI workflows enforcing build/test/lint, determinism, verification-gate, dependency-license, and no-secrets checks.
